item.text: {"concept":"throw","verdicts":[{"candidate":"A","verdict":"LOSSY","missing":"It omits rapid propulsion by movement of the arm and wrist, carrying only generic action with an unspecified body part that makes the object move far away.","quality":1,"reason":"The causal movement genus is present, but the defining arm-and-wrist manner is absent, so kicking or striking could satisfy it equally well."}]}
